title: codex-meter service-tier overrides
description: Per-session or per-window assertions of the service tier that applied during a Codex log range. Used when historical logs do not record the tier.

service_tier.description: The tier that applied. `priority` is treated as `fast`; `default` and `regular` as `standard`.

session.description: Session file name (e.g. rollout-2026-05-12T18-36-01-example.jsonl) or full path. Applies the override to this session only.

start.description: ISO datetime (YYYY-MM-DD or full ISO). Override applies from this time onward.

end.description: ISO datetime. Override applies up to (exclusive) this time.
